description: Composition Blue jacket made of 100% acrylic, has a ribbed mock collar with a full buttoned placket, has full sleeves with a ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Classic adidas style jacket for men. This jacket promises exemplary comfort with its luxe fabric. Smart enough to wear with a t-shirt. Wear this with a subtle t-shirt, denims, an understated belt and casual shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
